projects.name: Hadi Al Hajatron
projects.short_description: Arduino and Python grid-navigation robot with live mapping, frontier exploration, obstacle sensing, saved map output, and A* route planning.
projects.resume_bullet: Built a 4x4 Arduino-Python autonomous grid-navigation robot with 3 IR obstacle sensors, 60 cm calibrated movement steps, live Tkinter mapping, JSON map export, and A* route planning.

projects.name: FruitVision AI - Fruit Quality Detector for SMS
projects.short_description: Quality-first fruit grading website that predicts Fresh/Adulterant/Rotten quality, maps A/B/C grades, and displays annotated results.
projects.resume_bullet: Built a quality-first fruit grading web system with upload/camera workflows, YOLOv8x fruit-region detection, a 3-class Keras quality model, A/B/C grade mapping, and annotated result output.

projects.name: AI Image Analyzer
projects.status: backend module for larger Visage project
projects.short_description: Backend image-analysis pipeline for the larger Visage project, combining object detection, privacy-safe face tokens, scene captions, and JSON output.
projects.resume_bullet: Built a 3-stage backend image-analysis pipeline for a larger Visage project with YOLOv8n object detection, 13 allowed object classes, privacy-safe face tokens, BLIP captions, and 3-field JSON output.

projects.name: Quadruped Robot
projects.short_description: Quadruped motion work focused on inverse kinematics, leg movement, control logic, and practical actuation.
projects.resume_bullet: Built inverse-kinematics motion logic for stable leg movement and practical actuation.

projects.name: Schooling-Era Robotics Projects
projects.short_description: Multiple small robotics and embedded builds from schooling, mainly using Arduino for early prototyping and debugging.
projects.resume_bullet: Completed numerous small robotics and embedded builds during schooling; Arduino was used mainly in this phase for early prototyping, control experiments, wiring, and debugging.
